reasoning: Based on historical data and evidence gathered, Bad Bunny is a frequent top contender and was the #1 most streamed artist globally in 2020, 2021, and 2022. While an anecdotal Reddit comment from late September 2025 suggests Taylor Swift remains #1 daily and weekly contextually at times (search_5_result_4), the strong betting market odds from July indicate Bad Bunny accrued a formidable lead or has consistent year-to-date dominance. Without definitive end-of-year figures yet released, his position as the odds-on favourite gives him the highest probability, though uncertainties around Swift's late-year streaming momentum temper the estimate to 65%.
